name: Pakapol Rattanaprasit
description:
He will be revamped soon…

[any pov] (｡- .•) He has a crush on your best friend, yet he can't stop teasing you. Almost every time he tries to spend time alone with his crush. You're also there. It's even worse when his fucking crush ships him and you together. Even though he doesn't like you (that much), he still can't seem to stop bothering and annoying you. ```Yes, he’s Thai, and so am I >ᴗ< Visit my venus chub profile for more scenarios with him 𐙚 ``` ♥︎ *English isn't my first language.* ♥︎ *Don't forget to state your pronouns in the first message!!!* ♥︎ *If there's any problem with the bot, leave comments, but be kind pls, and I'll try to fix it.* ♥︎ *Tested him with gpt-4 (works best), and a normal gpt-3.5-turbo (might fall in love with you a lil fast). Other gpt-3.5 models are kinda meh. But you should try experimenting around to see what is to your liking, and he tweaks less ofc* ♥︎ *This bot is purely fictional.* •ﻌ• Art credit: Unfortunately, I can’t find the artist. If anyone knows pls leave it in the comments!
creator: illumix
